name: Sausage Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Prebake crust in a 10-inch pan.
2. Form sausage balls with your sausage meat.
3. Bring a large pot of water to a boil; add sausage balls.
4. Reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes. Drain and reserve.
5. Cut bacon into 2-inch squares and fry until crisp. Drain.
6. Sauté peppers and onions, then drain.
7. Beat eggs with cream and milk. Add salt and pepper.
8. Scatter half the cheese in the bottom of the pie shell.
9. Cover with fried bacon, sautéed onions, and peppers.
10. Layer sausage balls next.
11. Scatter the remaining cheese over the top.
12. Gently pour egg mixture into the shell over the meats and cheese.
13. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
